title: Crispy Thai Fried Rice
description: A classic Thai dish made with crispy fried rice, spring onions, and a variety of spices.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a wok over medium heat.
Add the sliced red chili and fry until fragrant.
Add the chopped spring onions and fry until softened.
Add the crispy fried rice and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the fried shallots, fish sauce, soy sauce, brown sugar, salt, and pepper. Stir-fry for another minute.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the fried rice to a serving platter.
Garnish with chopped spring onions and serve immediately.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as a fried egg or a side of vegetables.
